title: tanacetum heimerlii
intro: Tanacetum heimerlii, also known as Heimerl's tansy or Heimerl's feverfew, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountains of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve headaches due to its parthenolide content. The health benefits of Tanacetum heimerlii include its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief. Tanacetum heimerlii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
